title: Senior Teacher - NIT Warangal International Enterprises - Immediate Joiners Preferred

jsonLd.title: Senior Teacher - NIT Warangal International Enterprises - Immediate Joiners Preferred
jsonLd.description:
NIT Warangal International Enterprises, one of India's leading organizations, is hiring a Senior Teacher for our Navi Mumbai operations. We offer a competitive salary package along with world-class benefits.

About NIT Warangal International Enterprises:
NIT Warangal International Enterprises is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Conduct parent-teacher meetings and update parents on student performance
• Participate in school events, workshops, and training programs
• Develop and deliver engaging lesson plans for students
• Conduct doubt-clearing sessions and remedial classes for weak students
• Design formative and summative assessments aligned to learning objectives
• Coordinate with academic counselors for student career guidance
• Maintain classroom discipline and create a positive learning environment

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Tech / B.E. in Computer Science or related discipline
• 6-10 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Curriculum Development
• Proficiency in Lesson Planning
• Proficiency in E-learning
• Proficiency in Classroom Management
• Proficiency in Special Education
• Proficiency in Student Assessment
• Proficiency in Pedagogy
• Proficiency in Educational Technology

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Life and accident insurance
• Learning & development budget
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Salary Range: 12 LPA - 25 LPA per annum

Location: Navi Mumbai, Maharashtra, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with NIT Warangal International Enterprises!
